explanations.3: This hook from Docusaurus gives us information about the current blog post, like whether we're viewing a single post or a list of posts.
explanations.12: This is a custom hook (a reusable function) that figures out what CSS class name the container should have based on where we are in the app.
explanations.14: If we're NOT on a single blog post page, add extra spacing at the bottom; otherwise don't add any spacing class.
